description:
Git Extensions is a standalone UI tool for managing git repositories. It also integrates with Windows Explorer and Microsoft Visual Studio (2015/2017/2019).


Release Notes Highlights
- Required: .NET 10.0 Desktop Runtime v10.0.9 x64 or later 10.x
- Recommended: Git 2.53.0 or later
- Many updated and added translations
- Bug fixes for RC1
- Minor improvements
What's Changed
- feat(RevisionGrid): Draw ahead/behind info; adapt tag shape by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13104
- fix: remove unused UxTheme native methods by @gerhardol in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13117
- fix(FormCommit): Avoid empty diff on multi-selection by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13129
- Fix unhandled exception when selecting non-TrueType font in Appearance settings by @RussKie with @Copilot in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13145
- fix(Reset changes): Restrict to working dir by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13138
- fix: dispose Process handles by @gerhardol in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13134
- Do not show merge commit editor when there are no errors by @zvirja in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13148
- build(translation): Verify Transifex base files by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13135
- fix: checkout branch --track by @gerhardol in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13143
- ci(cla-check): Reject "noreply" email by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13150
- feat: hide fetch-all UI when there is only one remote by @gerhardol in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13064
- fix(ISetting): read and store bool in lowercase by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13154
- feat(.gitignore): Support single selected folder by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13147
- Avoid some string allocations, plus some collection tweaks by @Henr1k80 in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13139
- feat(RevisionGrid): Preview amend on Ctrl+click by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13137
- perf: make classes sealed by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13158
- feat(RevisionGrid): Improve label hover hit-test by @mdonatas in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13133
- fix: unblock UI thread while awaiting merge tool by @mstv in https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/pull/13159
Full Changelog: https://github.com/gitextensions/gitextensions/compare/v7.1.0...v7.2.0
